sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15091" key="a)ristero/xeir" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστερόχειρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χειρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n15091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">left-handed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
